findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find File and FileInput class objects
 * @description Finds all instantiations and references to File or FileInput class objects
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-file-input-objects
 * @tags files
 *       input
 *       security
 */

import python

predicate isFileClass(string name) {
  name in [
    "File",
    "FileInput",
    "UploadFile",
    "UploadedFile",
    "InMemoryUploadedFile",
    "TemporaryUploadedFile"
  ]
}

from Call c, string className
where
  (
    // Direct instantiation: File(...) or FileInput(...)
    c.getFunc().(Name).getId() = className
    and isFileClass(className)
  )
  or
  (
    // Attribute access instantiation: module.File(...) or module.FileInput(...)
    c.getFunc().(Attribute).getName() = className
    and isFileClass(className)
  )
select c, "File class instantiation found: " + className
findings.hypothesis: Find file upload class instantiations to understand file handling patterns

message.text: File class instantiation found: File
File class instantiation found: File
File class instantiation found: TemporaryUploadedFile
File class instantiation found: InMemoryUploadedFile

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find FileInput widget class definitions
 * @description Finds FileInput widget class definitions and their methods
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-fileinput-widget
 * @tags files
 *       widgets
 *       security
 */

import python

from Class cls
where
  cls.getName().matches("%File%") and
  cls.getName().matches("%Input%")
select cls, "FileInput-related class: " + cls.getName()
findings.hypothesis: Find FileInput widget classes to understand file upload handling

message.text: FileInput-related class: FileInput
FileInput-related class: ClearableFileInput

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find FileField validation methods
 * @description Finds FileField class and its validation methods
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-filefield-validation
 * @tags files
 *       validation
 *       security
 */

import python

from Class cls, Function func
where
  cls.getName().matches("%FileField%") and
  func = cls.getAMethod() and
  (func.getName() = "clean" or 
   func.getName() = "to_python" or
   func.getName() = "validate" or
   func.getName().matches("%valid%"))
select func, "FileField validation method: " + cls.getName() + "." + func.getName()
findings.hypothesis: Looking for FileField validation methods to understand how file uploads are validated

message.text: FileField validation method: FileField.to_python
FileField validation method: FileField.clean

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find multiple file handling in multipart parser
 * @description Finds code that handles multiple files in multipart form data
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-multiple-file-handling
 * @tags files
 *       multipart
 *       security
 */

import python

from Function f
where
  f.getEnclosingModule().getName().matches("%multipart%") and
  (
    f.getName().matches("%file%") or
    f.getName().matches("%upload%") or
    f.getName().matches("%handle%")
  )
select f, "Multipart file handling function: " + f.getName()
findings.hypothesis: Identify functions in multipart parser that handle file uploads to understand the flow

message.text: Multipart file handling function: handle_file_complete
Multipart file handling function: sanitize_file_name
Multipart file handling function: _close_files

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Potential SQL injection via raw queries
 * @description Finds uses of raw SQL queries that may be vulnerable to SQL injection
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/sql-injection-raw
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-089
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  (
    call = API::moduleImport("django").getMember("db").getMember("connection").getMember("cursor").getACall().getReturn().getMember("execute").getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("django").getMember("db").getMember("models").getMember("Model").getASubclass*().getMember("objects").getMember("raw").getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("django").getMember("db").getMember("models").getMember("expressions").getMember("RawSQL").getACall()
  )
select call, "Raw SQL query usage that may be vulnerable to SQL injection"
findings.hypothesis: Django applications using raw SQL queries without proper parameterization could be vulnerable to SQL injection

message.text: Raw SQL query usage that may be vulnerable to SQL injection
Raw SQL query usage that may be vulnerable to SQL injection
Raw SQL query usage that may be vulnerable to SQL injection

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Command injection via subprocess
 * @description Using subprocess or os.system with user-controlled input can lead to command injection
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/command-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  (
    call = API::moduleImport("subprocess").getMember(["call", "run", "Popen", "check_call", "check_output"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("os").getMember("system").getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("os").getMember("popen").getACall()
  )
select call, "Potential command injection via subprocess or os.system"
findings.hypothesis: Find potential command injection vulnerabilities where subprocess or os.system is used

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal vulnerability
 * @description Detects potential path traversal vulnerabilities where user input flows to file operations
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import python
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.DataFlow
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.TaintTracking
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.RemoteFlowSources
import semmle.python.Concepts

module PathTraversalConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    sink = any(FileSystemAccess fa).getAPathArgument()
  }
}

module PathTraversalFlow = TaintTracking::Global<PathTraversalConfig>;
import PathTraversalFlow::PathGraph

from PathTraversalFlow::PathNode source, PathTraversalFlow::PathNode sink
where PathTraversalFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential path traversal from $@.", source.getNode(), "user input"
findings.hypothesis: Path traversal vulnerability where user-controlled input flows to file system operations without proper validation

message.text: Potential path traversal from [user input](1).
Potential path traversal from [user input](1).
Potential path traversal from [user input](1).
Potential path traversal from [user input](1).

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Unsafe deserialization
 * @description Deserializing untrusted data using pickle or other unsafe methods can lead to arbitrary code execution
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/unsafe-deserialization
 * @tags security
 *        external/cwe/cwe-502
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  (
    call = API::moduleImport("pickle").getMember(["load", "loads", "Unpickler"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("yaml").getMember(["load", "unsafe_load"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("marshal").getMember(["load", "loads"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("shelve").getMember("open").getACall()
  )
select call, "Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code."
findings.hypothesis: Find unsafe deserialization operations using pickle, yaml, marshal, or shelve that could lead to arbitrary code execution
